prompt:
Regenerating the stock service with the current Go gRPC plugin broke server registration. The compiler says `*stockserver.Server does not implement stockpb.StockServer`; this repository retains a protected old stream snapshot and the new generated files plus migration notes, so the migration can be completed offline.

Please adapt the handwritten server to the new generated server/stream contract while preserving runtime behavior. Unary calls must still pass through the registered audit interceptor with caller metadata. Missing records, repository failures, and cancellations keep their existing status classification and original causes. Watch streams take cancellation from the stream context, stop emitting once canceled, preserve non-cancellation send statuses, and retain snapshot error mapping. Generated messages and their wire bytes cannot change.

Acceptance is `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...`. The test, go.mod, migration notes, old API snapshot, generated sources, and local RPC runtime are protected.

full_distill.primary_skill: adapt a handwritten Go gRPC service to the current generated embedding and generic streaming API while preserving protocol and middleware semantics
full_distill.baseline_evidence: go test -race -timeout 30s ./... deterministically fails to compile at RegisterStockServer with wrong type for method Watch because Server still accepts legacygrpc.Stock_WatchServer instead of the current generic stream
full_distill.success_contract: the current generated server registers with its interceptor, returns causal stable unary statuses including cancellation observed during repository work, honors stream-context cancellation and send errors, and emits the unchanged generated message wire representation
adversarial_factors: the generated current API, old stream snapshot, local RPC runtime, and go.mod are protected, so editing generated interfaces or making old and new stream names aliases cannot manufacture compatibility
two dynamic lookup records and an interceptor log assert full method name, actor metadata, after-call execution, and repository call counts, rejecting a direct-call bypass around registration

an injected lookup hook cancels the caller while repository work is in progress and returns context.Canceled, pinning the shipped unary classification so a stream-only generated-API migration cannot regress unrelated status behavior

stream fakes cover an initially canceled call, cancellation after a successful empty snapshot, cancellation during the sole final successful send, and an Unavailable send error, so checking only setup or the next loop iteration and broad Internal remapping all fail
a golden protobuf byte sequence is derived from a real service response while status tests retain errors.Is causes, preventing message reshaping and cause-dropping wrappers
